programmes.show_description: NHK World-Japan's flagship hourly news programme delivers the latest world news, business and weather with a focus on Japan and the rest of Asia.
Traditional tsukemono (pickles) preserve centuries of wisdom and allow the vegetables' inherent flavours to shine - picklers uphold tradition while embracing new challenges for modern tastes.
NHK World-Japan's flagship hourly news programme delivers the latest world news, business and weather with a focus on Japan and the rest of Asia.
Dig deeper into current affairs with cutting-edge information and critical analysis on important issues confronting Japanese lives.
NHK World-Japan's flagship hourly news programme delivers the latest world news, business and weather with a focus on Japan and the rest of Asia.
Octopuses are not only eaten in Japan, but also depicted in works of art - they may be regarded as objects of worship or even kept as pets. We untangle Japan's long relationship with these creatures.
NHK World-Japan's flagship hourly news programme delivers the latest world news, business and weather with a focus on Japan and the rest of Asia.
Hakusai (Chinese cabbage) is a winter staple in Japan - discover unique farming and harvesting techniques and see its use in pickles, popular ramen, and French cuisine.

Japanese culture is in the global spotlight like never before - dive into the work of international scholars exploring Japan in bold original ways and uncovering unique perspectives and deep insights.

This programme gives you comprehensive coverage of events in Japan and Asia, explaining the day's developments and what is behind them.
Tomita Hiroshi is the founder of a company that specialises in detecting underground cavities - he discusses how his technology is reducing risks and mitigating damage from all sorts of disasters.
NHK World-Japan presents a variety of short programmes focusing on Japan and Asia.

Makihara Daizoh is drawing attention from around the world for crafting timepieces that embody a Japanese aesthetic - he talks about the appeal of analogue watchmaking in the digital age.
The number of tornadoes is surging in the US, the world's hotspot - what is driving this rise? We meet scientists who are uncovering their mechanisms and using new technology to save lives.
